slide1.title: A discreet selection of pieces made to last.
slide1.subtitle: Noble materials, clean cuts, a neutral palette. Designed with care, crafted for everyday wear.

slide2.title: Quality lives in the details.
slide2.subtitle: Linen, wool and premium cotton. Garments that improve with time and wear.

slide3.title: Fewer pieces, more intention.
slide3.subtitle: A capsule wardrobe designed to combine naturally, season after season.

women.title: Fluid silhouettes, quiet confidence.
women.subtitle: Dresses, coats and knits that balance femininity and structure.

men.title: Relaxed tailoring, assured attitude.
men.subtitle: Impeccable shirts, perfectly cut trousers and layers for every occasion.

accessories.title: The detail that completes the look.
accessories.subtitle: Belts, bags and eyewear chosen with the same care as our garments.

shoes.title: A steady step, timeless design.
shoes.subtitle: From leather sneakers to boots with clean lines — comfort without compromising style.
